metadata.name: Track a Shipment of Finished Vehicles

description: A dealership is asking for the status of a shipment of 10 vehicles that was supposed to arrive today.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the shipment order details using the dealership's ID.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the shipment order and the carrier details.

nodes.task_description: Check the GPS location of the transport truck carrying the vehicles.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pings the carrier's GPS and finds the truck is 50 miles away, delayed by traffic.

nodes.task_description: Provide the dealership with an updated estimated time of arrival.

expected_outcome.value: Agent informs the dealership of the new ETA.
